creator: keren_sky@live.com
text:
Hi,

Seeing the following when trying to update. On FreeBSD 11 with up to date ports tree. Best Regards,

env XML_CATALOG_FILES="file:///usr/ports/misc/freebsd-doc-en/work/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/pgpkeys/catalog-cwd.xml  file:///usr/ports/misc/freebsd-doc-en/work/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/share/xml/catalog.xml  file:///usr/ports/misc/freebsd-doc-en/work/doc/share/xml/catalog.xml  file:///usr/local/share/xml/catalog" /usr/local/bin/xsltproc  --xinclude --nonet --maxvars 20000  --stringparam latestrevision.timestamp "2018-01-17 20:18:42 AST"  --stringparam latestrevision.committer "root"  --stringparam latestrevision.number "filedate" --param docformatnav "'1'" --param img.src.path "'/usr/ports/misc/freebsd-doc-en/work/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/pgpkeys/../../../share/images/articles/pgpkeys/'" --param callout.graphics.path "'/usr/ports/misc/freebsd-doc-en/work/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/pgpkeys/imagelib/callouts/'" --maxdepth 6000 http://www.FreeBSD.org/XML/share/xml/freebsd-fo.xsl article.parsed.print.xml > article.fo                                                                                          
�Making portrait pages on A4 paper (210mmx297mm)                                                                                                                           
�No "en" localization of "Lastmodified" exists.                                                                                                                            
�No "en" localization of "on" exists.                                                                                                                                      
�runtime error: file file:///usr/ports/misc/freebsd-doc-en/work/doc/share/xml/freebsd-fo.xsl line 520 element variable                                                    xsltApplySequenceConstructor: A potential infinite template recursion was detected.                                                                                       
You can adjust xsltMaxDepth (--maxdepth) in order to raise the maximum number of nested template calls and variables/params (currently set to 6000).
